title: Persona Consistency Test Bench
description: Compare repeated persona responses and distinguish harmless variation, context-sensitive change, behavioral inconsistency, and loss of character fidelity.

learningObjectives: Compare repeated persona responses and distinguish harmless variation, context-sensitive change, behavioral inconsistency, and loss of character fidelity.

commonMisconceptions: Synthetic agreement is equivalent to validated customer evidence.
